title: Store Settings
description: Manage your store details, payments, and notifications.

general.title: General Store Info
general.desc: Update your brand name, logo, and contact details.

region.title: Region & Currency
region.desc: Configure your physical location and base currency.
region.currencyDesc: Prices will be calculated based on this default currency.

payments.title: Payment Gateways
payments.desc: Enable or disable checkout payment methods.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Manage how the system communicates with you.
notifications.emailNewOrderDesc: Receive an email notification immediately when a customer places an order.
notifications.smsLowStockDesc: Get text messages when product inventory drops below the threshold.
notifications.dailyReportDesc: A daily email at 8:00 AM with yesterday's total sales and metrics.
